assertions.reason: The exact ws_client_proxy_test startup registration test passed and verified a relay register message with a non-empty sessionId plus displayName, version, workspacePath, and pid metadata.
The unreachable-relay test passed, showing stdio echoed through the wrapper unchanged while the wrapper stayed in degraded mode and kept relay-connectivity diagnostics out of stderr.
The attached-forwarding test passed and covered agentMessage forwarding to the relay only after attach while still passing the message through wrapper stdout.
The same attached-forwarding test passed and confirmed serverRequest messages were forwarded while toolCall and unknown messages were not relayed.
The server-command injection test passed, verifying relay input became turn/start JSONL, interrupt became turn/interrupt JSONL, and remote input was ignored once detached.

The auto-detach test passed, showing local turn/start generated an auto-detach notice, stopped forwarding and remote input until reattach; attached non-turn/start traffic stayed forwardable in the attached-forwarding test.

The reconnect tests passed, showing the wrapper re-registered with the same sessionId after disconnect, cleared stale attached state during the outage, and resumed remote input/message forwarding after reattach.

commandsRun.command: env CARGO_TERM_COLOR=never cargo test --manifest-path "/data/dl/fschannel/wrapper/Cargo.toml" --test ws_client_proxy_test registers_with_relay_on_startup -- --exact --nocapture
commandsRun.observation: Passed registers_with_relay_on_startup (1 passed, 6 filtered); validated relay registration payload fields on startup.
Passed stdio_proxy_continues_when_relay_is_unreachable (1 passed, 6 filtered); validated degraded-mode stdio proxying and log-only relay warning behavior.
Passed forwards_only_agent_and_server_request_messages_when_attached (1 passed, 6 filtered); validated attached agent/serverRequest forwarding and non-forwarding of toolCall/unknown traffic.
Passed injects_server_commands_only_while_attached (1 passed, 6 filtered); validated turn/start and turn/interrupt injection plus detached gating.
Passed local_turn_start_auto_detaches_until_reattached (1 passed, 6 filtered); validated auto-detach on local turn/start and recovery after reattach.
Passed reconnects_and_reregisters_after_disconnect (1 passed, 6 filtered); validated reconnect with the same sessionId and fresh register message.

Passed disconnect_clears_attached_state_and_drops_stale_messages_until_reattached (1 passed, 6 filtered); validated stale relay input/message suppression until explicit reattach, then resumed forwarding.

summary: Validated 7 assigned wrapper relay assertions with 7 targeted ws_client_proxy_test cargo invocations; all assigned assertions passed.
